description: A foundational firmware template for AIoT development on Infineon PSoC Edge E84 boards, pre-configured with subsystems like HMI, sensors, WiFi, and FreeRTOS for building task-based applications.
display_name: TESAIoT Dev Kit Master Project Template
quick_start_steps: Clone or download the project from the repository.
Download an episode example from the TESAIoT website and place it in the 'proj_cm55/apps/' folder.
Build the project using ModusToolbox and CMake.
Flash the firmware to the PSoC Edge E84 board and test the application.
